other_observers: Brian Gibbons, Steve Brown; Brian and Steve caught the bird in a mist net at the edge of Russian olives.
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch - RMBO Banding Station
description: Seeing this bird in he hand, it's yellow rump contrasting with an olive back and dark tail eliminate all but Magnolia and Yellow-rumped Warblers. It has extensive yellow on the face and olive auricular and olive cap. The legs were dark gray. The breast was streaked with verticle dark bars and had a yellow wash.Behaviors: Moved up into a tall tree after it gave a loud and thin chip note. It was caught while foragging in Kochia near the ground.Call: very high chip when it was released from bandingPlumage: juvenile
